Hello,
I have a patch here:

http://gahr.ch/FreeBSD/patches/R_3.diff

which builds fine.

Unfortunately, I had to remove support for PDF_MANUALS, as a missing TeX
file causes the build to break.

I will commit this version if it's fine with you.

- --
Pietro Cerutti
gahr@FreeBSD.org
